title: limonium altum
intro: Limonium altum, also known as Sea Lavender or Statice, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Limonium altum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Limonium altum typically involve infusions, teas, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and well-being.
